DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: Appropriate adjustment to flight crew Flight Duty Period (FDP) times are applied.

Note.Para: This provision is not intended to prohibit OFCR inspections by crew members.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate overhead flight crew rest (OFCR) closed (AMM DDG 25-29-01).

ListItem.Para: Remove all baggage and personal items from the OFCR.

Note.Para: Blankets, pillows and other items normally used may remain.

ListItem.Para: The OFCR is not available for in flight use. Remove personal items and do not enter except for inspections by crew members.
For augmented flight crew operations, flight crew duty periods should be adjusted appropriately.

DispatchCondition.Title: Procedures Do Not Require Its Use

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided procedures do not require its use.
Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided OFCR door is removed.

OperationNote.Para: For augmented flight crew operations, flight crew duty periods should be adjusted appropriately.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: OFCR door is verified to open from the outside using the override feature.
OFCR door is verified to open and close normally from the inside.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Verify the OFCR door can be opened from the outside using the override feature, and verify the OFCR door opens and closes normally from the inside (AMM DDG 25-29-01).

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

ListItem.Para: Seat position or seat assembly is not occupied.
Folding type seat stows automatically or is secured in the retracted position.

Note.Para: An automatic folding seat that will not stow automatically is considered inoperative.
A seat position with an inoperative or missing restraint system is considered inoperative.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: For automatic stowing inoperative, secure seat in stowed position (AMM DDG 25-29-01).

OperationNote.Para: For augmented flight crew operations, flight crew duty periods should be adjusted appropriately.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
May be inoperative provided bunk is not occupied.

Note.Para: A bunk with an inoperative or missing restraint system is considered inoperative.

OperationNote.Para: For augmented flight crew operations, flight crew duty periods should be adjusted appropriately.
